recommendations.title: Return of the Living Dead: Necropolis
recommendations.overview: In an attempt to rescue their friend from an evil corporation, a group of teenagers end up releasing a horde of bloodthirsty zombies.

recommendations.title: Vampires: Los Muertos
recommendations.overview: Tough-as-nails vampire hunter Derek Bliss is on the hunt for "suckers" in the heart of Mexico when he receives a new assignment from a mysterious client. Thrown together with a group of slayers, including sexy Zooey, who may or may not be one of the

recommendations.title: Near Dark
recommendations.overview: A farm boy reluctantly becomes a member of the undead when a girl he meets turns out to be part of a band of vampires who roam the highways in stolen cars.

recommendations.title: Non Negotiable
recommendations.overview: Hostage negotiator Alan Bender is called to rescue the president from a kidnapping, only to find himself also mediating to save his wife and marriage.

recommendations.title: Arsenal
recommendations.overview: After the deadbeat brother of a businessman is assumed to be in on his own kidnapping, his sibling must take action to rescue him.

recommendations.title: Death Whisperer 2
recommendations.overview: Three years after his sister's death, Yak relentlessly searches for the dark spirit that killed her in hopes of seeking revenge.

recommendations.title: Bartkowiak
recommendations.overview: After his brother dies in a car crash, a disgraced MMA fighter takes over the family nightclub — and soon learns his sibling's death wasn’t an accident.

recommendations.title: Gangs of Wasseypur - Part 1
recommendations.overview: In 1970s India, Sardar Khan vows to take revenge on the man who killed his father decades earlier.

recommendations.title: Evil Dead Rise
recommendations.overview: A reunion between two estranged sisters gets cut short by the rise of flesh-possessing demons, thrusting them into a primal battle for survival as they face the most nightmarish version of family imaginable.

recommendations.title: Werewolf of London
recommendations.overview: A strange animal attack turns a botanist into a bloodthirsty monster.
